pr.title: Non-record: Random Linear Maps + Learned Adapters (val_bpb=1.607, 1.92MB artifact)

output.summary: Regenerate nearly all linear weights from fixed seeds and only learn rank-16 adapters so the 5-layer GPT fits in a ~2 MB artifact.
techniques: Seeded random base matrices with persistent=False to skip storing noise
Trainable rank-16 adapters on every attention/MLP projection
MuON+AdamW training with EMA and sliding-window eval
